description:
A STATISTICAL RESEARCH ON THE EFFECTS OF MENTAL HEALTH ON STUDENTS’ CGPA dataset
This Data set was collected by a survey conducted by Google forms from University student in order to examine their current academic situation and mental health.

All the data was based on Malaysia and collected from Iium (International Islamic University Malaysia).

recordsets.recordset_description: This Data set was collected by a survey conducted by Google forms from University student in order to examine their current academic situation and mental health.

results.key: Did you seek any specialist for a treatment?
results.reason: Strongly indicates the presence of a health condition and seeking treatment, an IN-SCOPE sensitive characteristic (Disability & health conditions).
